feed.title: matti.dad
feed.subtitle: A blog by Tim Matti — Ruby, Rails, AI, bowhunting, archery, and being a dad in the woods.

entry.title: hello, woods and terminal
entry.content:
This is matti.dad — a place for field notes from the two halves of my life that matter most: the terminal and the woods.

I’ll write about Ruby, Rails, databases, AI, and software agents. I’ll also write about bowhunting, archery, being a dad, and cooking over fire.

The goal is one voice, not two separate blogs. The same habits that make you a better programmer make you a better hunter: patience, observation, iteration, and showing up even when it doesn’t feel like anything is happening.

More soon.
entry.summary: This is matti.dad — a place for field notes from the two halves of my life that matter most: the terminal and the woods.
